headlines.title: Oil Prices Fall as Trump Launches “Project Freedom” and OPEC+ Increases Output
headlines.summary: Oil prices edged lower in early Asian trading on Monday after President Trump announced the U.S. would guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz and OPEC+ confirmed a modest output increase. headlines.title: Big Oil Begins Return to Canada amid Energy Crunch

headlines.title: China Flips the Switch on Fuel Exports as Asia Runs Short
headlines.summary: Beijing is reversing its curbs on refined fuel exports after halting shipments in the opening days of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
